project_type: Next.js 15 App Router PWA (quick commerce grocery app)
build_system: npm + next build (requires DATABASE_URL for full build, not available in sandbox)
test_framework: tsx --test for unit tests, Playwright for UI tests
verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck` for type checking and `npx next lint` for lint. Full build requires DATABASE_URL.
environment_constraints: Open internet. DATABASE_URL not available so `next build` cannot complete. Use tsc + lint for validation.
contribution_requirements: Pure visual/styling changes only - zero changes to functionality, routing, data fetching, or DB logic. Keep using Tailwind CSS. Extend existing HSL CSS variables and Tailwind config.
key_patterns: Uses CVA for button variants, framer-motion for animations, CSS utility classes in globals.css (.card-shadow, .ios-glass, etc.), HSL CSS variables for theming, Tailwind config extends colors/shadows/radius. Font: Inter_Tight (--font-sans) + Manrope (--font-display). Primary: #050505, Secondary: #22C55E, existing neutral uses slate-* scale.
directory_structure: app/ (Next.js routes + API routes + admin/customer pages), components/ (UI, cart, auth, checkout, map, admin, home, tracking, delivery, account, onboarding, ui/), lib/ (constants, products, validation, prisma, motion, utils), public/ (PWA icons), types/
